title: Rewind Watch
description: Use the Rewind Watch to save your position, and then use it again to rewind yourself to that position
body:
Use the Rewind Watch to save your position, and then use it again to rewind yourself to that position! Be warned that the further you rewind yourself, the longer it will take.

To use it, right click with the watch to save your position. When you want to recall yourself, right click again and wait to rematerialize.

This mod was originally made for [ModFest 1.21](https://modfest.net/1.21).

![Rewind Watch usage demo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9TIvoEkj/images/14a762c8a8b49da671194cc0815ccb9079332fa2.webp)
